name: standards closed-loop validation reports a per-step status summary covering each pipeline phase
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-source test-std --emit summary 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=catalog' out.txt && grep -q 'step=fetch' out.txt && grep -q 'step=coverage' out.txt && grep -q 'step=audit' out.txt && grep -q 'step=diff' out.txt && grep -q 'step=promote' out.txt && grep -q 'step=report' out.txt && grep -q 'step=monitor' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
